text: Hey, I was just wondering if there’s a way to check the status of my order? I think it’s been a while but I can’t find any info. Thanks!

I’ve been trying to change my email on my account for a while now, but when I go to the settings page, it says my current email isn’t registered, which is confusing because I’m getting notifications at that email! Can you please clarify why I can’t update it if it's supposedly not associated with my account? It feels like a contradiction to me. What’s going on?
I'm trying to upload a file but it just fails. The error says something about the format being wrong, but I'm sure it's correct. Can you help? It's really frustrating.

I'm having a bit of a challenging situation with my account. I attempted to log in this morning, but it seems like my credentials aren't working. Honestly, I've tried resetting my password a couple of times, but the emails with the reset instructions haven't been coming through, which is quite frustrating. I can't seem to figure out why this is happening, and it feels like important information is being lost in the process. Can you assist me in resolving this issue so I can regain access? Thanks, I appreciate any help!

Could you please let me know if you have any student discount programs? I would also appreciate any information on how to apply, as I am currently looking into school expenses and budgeting for my courses. Additionally, I heard through a friend that your service is quite reputable, which is why I'm reaching out.

I have been trying to resolve an issue with my account, but every time I contact support, they tell me there's nothing wrong. It's quite frustrating, especially since my emails are getting lost. The system seems fine, so I don't understand why I'm being told otherwise.

Dear Customer Service, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally request a refund for my recent purchase due to an issue that I encountered. The item was defective upon arrival, and I believe that I am entitled to a full refund as per your policy. Please let me know the steps I need to take to initiate this process. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
I'm really confused about how to use the new features you added. Can you help me understand what's different? I feel like I might be missing something.
I thought our service was available 24/7, but why can't I access it now? Is there a downtime that's not mentioned anywhere?

I've been trying to connect to the app on my phone, but every time I do, it gets stuck on the loading screen for ages. I even tried uninstalling and reinstalling it, which took a long time because my internet is slow, and I don’t know why it keeps doing this. Also, I think there might be an unrelated issue with my laptop’s battery draining too quickly. Can you help me figure this out? Thanks!
I need to return this item because it didn't work as expected. How do I get my money back?

So, um, I was trying to update the app on my phone, but it keeps saying there's some kinda error and I can't figure out what it is! I mean, I thought I followed all the steps right, but now I’m just confused and need help, please. Is anyone else having this issue or is it just me? I feel like I’ve done everything right but it’s still not working, which is super frustrating.

I'm kinda curious about how your system works—like, do I have to do anything special to make sure my data is safe when I'm using your app? There's so much info out there and honestly, I'm a bit confused about what's what. Also, is there any kind of guarantee that my personal details won't get leaked or anything like that? Thanks for clarifying, if you can!
I definitely want my money back for the product I never ordered, but I actually received it last week. Can you process the refund anyway? I'm so confused about this!
I thought I signed up for monthly payments, but now it says yearly? Can you clarify that?
I returned the shoes but I didn’t get my refund yet. I think I should have received it by now.
